description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes code on every push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a weekly schedule. Run a single ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions, contents, and write permission for security events. Use a matrix strategy to analyze C++ code with CodeQL, checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL tools, running a bash script to build for Linux, configuring dependencies, and then performing the CodeQL analysis.
